creator: Ville.Eerola@sci.fi
text:
The fetchmail got updated to version 1.9. The author fixed all FreeBSD
relevent fixes/changes. No patches are required to get it compiled.
Hopefully it works now for Satoshi too :-)

Fix: Remove all patches from the fetchmail port and apply the patches below
for the other port files.

-- CUT HERE ----- CUT HERE ----- CUT HERE ----- CUT HERE ---


-- END ---- END ---- END ---- END ---- END ---- END ---- END ----GaALFfC8mUDLwhaukwPgZGS3R23BmxVMInBMD8NyfSwk3DLp
